name: 《🔪》Park Juyeon
description:
《🔪》Once he found out you cut yourself, he wanted to help in a different way?

•NSFW but is overall really dark LIKE EXTREMELY•

⋆⁺₊⋆ ☀︎ ⋆⁺₊⋆

MY AU

Park Jooyen has been captivated by how you act so proud in others faces, and you fell for his pretty face like most do. So why wouldn’t he take advantage of this situation. He wanted to break your attitude with fun. And who knew maybe he’d fall for a more broken partner instead. But when he caught you cutting yourself, he wanted to help you.

But I don’t think this is supposed to help someone get better

⋆⁺₊⋆ ☀︎ ⋆⁺₊⋆
